note: Mathlib/Analysis/SpecialFunctions/Trigonometric/Chebyshev/Orthogonality.lean:131 — proves Chebyshev T polynomials are orthogonal w.r.t. measureT (a specific weighted measure); this is one family, not the general theory of orthogonal polynomials (no such general concept/def exists in Mathlib).

Mathlib/Computability/Halting.lean:65 — theorem halting_problem (n) : ¬ComputablePred fun c => (eval c n).Dom, docstring '**Halting problem** is not computable'; this IS the undecidability-of-the-halting-problem theorem.

Mathlib/LinearAlgebra/Dimension/StrongRankCondition.lean:678 — 'An extension of rings R ⊆ S is quadratic if S is a free R-algebra of rank 2'; general ring/field extension class (a quadratic field is the special case IsQuadraticExtension ℚ K with K a field), no ℚ-specific 'quadratic field' def exists.

Mathlib/Combinatorics/Extremal/RuzsaSzemeredi.lean:50 — noncomputable def ruzsaSzemerediNumber, 'the maximum number of edges a locally linear graph on that type can have'; file also proves the asymptotic lower bound (ruzsaSzemerediNumberNat_asymptotic_lower_bound), i.e. the actual RS problem.
